ai.notes: The form uses Recruitee's dynamic field generation. The final textarea field was truncated in the provided HTML excerpt but is included as a textarea.

fields.question: How many years of professional experience do you have in a comparable position?
Do you have a Polish business entity that can invoice B2B, or are you willing to set one up before starting?

What is your preferred B2B net hourly rate [PLN]? Please keep in mind that this rate should cover the use of your own computer and any vacation time, as we don't offer paid leave or benefits. It's easier to divide your expected salary by 168 hours.
Are you open to rate negotiation?
Are you looking for a full-time commitment with your next role, or are you seeking something more flexible or parallel to other engagements?
What is your English language proficiency level?
options: A1 (Beginner): Basic phrases, very limited communication.
A2 (Elementary): Simple tasks, basic professional interactions.
B1 (Intermediate): Understands main points, handles routine IT discussions.
B2 (Upper Intermediate): Good operational command, fluent in most IT contexts.
C1 (Advanced): Highly proficient, effective communication in complex IT scenarios.
C2 (Proficient): Near-native fluency, comprehensive understanding for any IT role.

fields.question: Do you currently live in Poland?
Which city are you primarily based in?
Can you work on your computer?
If you’re currently employed, we’d appreciate if you could tell us what motivates you to explore new career opportunities.
When would you be available to start a new role?
